title: An Act relative to non-disclosure agreements relating to a claim of discrimination, non-payment of wages or benefits, retaliation, harassment or violation of public policy in employment

abstracts.abstract: By Representative DuBois of Brockton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 2095) of Michelle M. DuBois relative to non-disclosure agreements relating to a claim of discrimination, non-payment of wages or benefits, retaliation, harassment or violation of public policy in employment.  Labor and Workforce Development.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Labor and Workforce Development

related_entities.name: committee on Labor and Workforce Development

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 10/28/2025 from 10:00 AM-02:00 PM in A-1
Reporting date extended to Wednesday, March 18, 2026
Accompanied a study order, see H5209
